Cloud Sync

Share floor plans across devices via a private GitHub Gist. Same Gist ID on every device. Changes merge by per-item timestamp; deletions on one device propagate to others.

Create a fine-grained token with Gists: Read & Write. Token lives in localStorage on this device only.
